description: Organize all asset files from project root into a structured assets/ directory hierarchy
steps: Create directory structure: assets/sprites/characters/, assets/sprites/enemies/, assets/sprites/npcs/, assets/sprites/items/, assets/sprites/world/, assets/audio/music/, assets/audio/sfx/, assets/audio/voices/, assets/references/

Move character sprite ZIPs to assets/sprites/characters/: Meow Knight.zip, FREE_Cat 2D Pixel Art.zip, FreeCatCharacterAnimations.zip, cute-white-cat-character-different-poses.zip, set-funny-white-cats-cartoon-characters-set.zip, RPGMCharacter_v1.0.zip, Tiny RPG Character Asset Pack v1.03b -Free Soldier&Orc.zip
Move enemy sprite ZIPs to assets/sprites/enemies/: Knight & Monsters Sounds Pack.zip, Pixel Crawler - Free Pack 2.09.zip
Move NPC sprite ZIPs to assets/sprites/npcs/: NPC_Characters_v1.0.zip
Move item sprite ZIPs to assets/sprites/items/: 20.05b - Breakable Pots 1.1a.zip, Cute_Fantasy_Free.zip, Sprites.zip

Move world/tilemap ZIPs to assets/sprites/world/: Legacy Fantasy - Debug Map.zip, Legacy-Fantasy - High Forest 2.0.zip, Pixel Art Top Down - Basic v1.2.3.zip, RPG_Essentials_Free.zip, Sunny-land-files.zip, sunny-land-phaser-project.zip, Sunnyside_World_ARCHIVED_ASSETS.zip, Sunnyside_World_ASSET_PACK_V2.1.zip, Tiny Swords (Free Pack).zip, Tiny Swords.zip
Move music/ambience WAVs to assets/audio/music/: Ambience Day (Gj).wav

Move SFX WAVs to assets/audio/sfx/: Armor break.wav, Dagger Basic Attack Combo.wav, Footsteps Loop 1 (Rpg).wav, Footsteps Loop 2 (Rpg).wav, Footsteps Loop 3 (Rpg).wav, Footsteps Loop 4 (Rpg).wav, Footsteps Loop Together (Rpg).wav, Invisibility Smoke Sound.wav, Leap (Gj3).wav, Level up Pickup (Rpg).wav, Monster death (Rpg).wav, Monster roar (Rpg).wav, Plant type buff.wav, Rage up.wav, Sword Slash (Rpg).wav, UI Close.wav, UI Open.wav, Weapon Break.wav
Move voice WAVs to assets/audio/voices/: Calm NPC Voice.wav, Happi Npc Voice.wav
Move SFX/music ZIP packs to assets/audio/sfx/: Audio Files - Part 3.zip, Audio Files - Part 4.zip, Minifantasy_Dungeon_SFX.zip
Move reference files to assets/references/: Reference Sheet Audio Files Parts 1-5.pdf, sunnyside_world_chatacter_anim_human_v1.0.aseprite
Use git mv for all moves so git tracks the renames properly
Verify no asset files (ZIP, WAV, PDF, aseprite) remain in the project root
acceptance_criteria: All ZIP files are moved from root to appropriate assets/ subdirectories
All WAV files are moved from root to assets/audio/ subdirectories
PDF and Aseprite files are moved to assets/references/
No asset files remain in project root
Project files (gradle, composeApp, README, etc.) remain untouched in root
All moves use git mv so history is preserved
verification: Run: ls /projects/sandbox/GAIME/assets/sprites/ -- should show characters/, enemies/, npcs/, items/, world/
Run: ls /projects/sandbox/GAIME/assets/audio/ -- should show music/, sfx/, voices/
Run: ls /projects/sandbox/GAIME/assets/references/ -- should show the PDF and Aseprite file
findings: All 49 asset files (26 ZIPs, 21 WAVs, 1 PDF, 1 Aseprite) successfully moved from project root to structured assets/ directory using git mv. All renames tracked at 100% similarity. No source code changes needed. Build verification skipped as no source files were modified.
